_meta.name: RunPod Autopilot Lifecycle SSOT (골화)
_meta.description: Frozen ruleset for runpod lifecycle automation — create→bootstrap→train→monitor→sentinel→crash_recover→ckpt_save→r2_upload→teardown→next_round. Autopilot .hexa MUST parse these rules, not hardcode them.
_meta.rule_r14: 이 파일이 변경되면 training/runpod_autopilot.hexa + runpod_watchdog.hexa + runpod_autopilot_test.hexa 동기 검증할 것

known_bugs.root_cause: Qwen2 generate() kwarg removed in transformers 4.45+; kr_gen call passes unsupported kwarg and crashes generate path.

unsloth fast_generate during kr_gen sentinel allocates KV cache without first freeing fwd/bwd activations. OOM at ~80 MiB request with <50 MiB reserved-but-unallocated. Halving batch does NOT help — batch 1 still OOMs because activations from prior training step linger.

known_bugs.pattern: CUDA out of memory.*reserved by PyTorch but unallocated
known_bugs.root_cause: True batch/activation overflow — fragmentation with large reserved-unallocated chunk suggests forward+backward won't fit. Halve batch (or enable expandable_segments).
Corpus path not present on pod — cannot recover blindly (silent retry = infinite loop).
MooseFS session quota silent SIGKILL during ckpt save.
kr_gen_sentinel detected repetition / JSON bracket / charloop collapse.

trigger_rules: gpu_idle_duration_sec > 600 AND status != TRAINING AND status != SAVING AND status != UPLOADING
auto_teardown.method_note: on-pod runpodctl has no API key — teardown MUST run from local controller via runpodctl with ~/.runpod/config.toml

r2_upload.timing: after training exit code 0 only — never in-training (MFS quota trap)

patch_fn_registry._description: SSOT of autopilot patch functions invoked by crash_recover actions. Each entry describes: the sed/python operations the action performs, the exact string deltas to apply, idempotency rule, and the restart envelope after patch succeeds.

patch_kr_gen_oom_fix.description: Injects gc.collect()+torch.cuda.empty_cache() before/after model.generate() in kr_gen, wraps generate in torch.no_grad() if missing, reduces max_new_tokens 64→32. Also ensures `import gc` is present. Applies to on-pod /tmp/_r10_train.py AND laptop-side launch_alm_14b_r10.hexa heredoc.
patch_kr_gen_oom_fix.idempotency: Check for the sentinel comment 'E6 OOM fix' before re-applying. If present, skip.
patch_kr_gen_oom_fix.verify_success: first-batch CE <3.0 AND step 200 kr_gen writes kr_gen_step_200.json without OOM
patch_kr_gen_oom_fix.rollback: if 3 consecutive restarts hit same pattern, escalate to abort_with_ALERT

strip_kwarg_and_restart.description: sed-strips num_logits_to_keep= kwarg from all kr_gen.py/generate call sites on pod.

drop_batch_size_half_and_restart.description: Halves --batch in launcher args and restarts. Respects min_batch_size=1 — if already at 1, escalate to abort.
drop_batch_size_half_and_restart.restart_envelope: re-run launcher with AUTOPILOT_BATCH_HALF=1 env, launcher must honor this flag to halve its own config

cleanup_ckpt_and_restart.description: rm -rf partial ckpt dir + mkdir fresh + retry. Often pairs with lower save_every or delayed save schedule.

next_round_auto_launch.policy: after successful R2 upload + teardown, autopilot reads training_queue.json and launches next entry if preconditions met

preflight_steps.name: mfs_quota
preflight_steps.cmd: dd if=/dev/zero of=/workspace/_q_test bs=1M count=20000 status=none && rm /workspace/_q_test

schema.autopilot_action_taken: action id from known_bugs or custom

rules_applied.R_hexa_first: All autopilot code in .hexa only — no .py/.rs/.sh
rules_applied.R_mfs_quota: Preflight dd + save_every>=2000 + fresh ckpt dir + no in-training upload
